goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should serve 'chinese' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range.
Make sure you get 'address', 'postcode', and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve chinese food
The restaurant should be in the expensive price range
Make sure you get address, postcode, and phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the same price range as the restaurant
The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should include free parking
Make sure you get star of the hotel
